steps.title: Include the tax multiplier
steps.content:
An $8\%$ tax makes each tablet cost $108\%$ of $156$:
$$156(1.08)=168.48$$

steps.title: Apply the budget limit
steps.content:
The budget gives
$$168.48n\le42{,}500$$
Divide by $168.48$:
$$n\le\frac{42{,}500}{168.48}$$
This is about $252.25$, so the maximum whole number is $252$. The answer is 252.
